hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|&&|\|\||[;|])\s*gh\s+pr\s+create' || exit 0; active=$(gh auth status 2>&1 | awk '/Active account: true/{print prev} {prev=$0}' | grep -oP 'account \K\S+' || echo 'unknown'); [ "$active" = 'dev-paul-fleischmann' ] && exit 0; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"gh pr create erfordert dev-paul-fleischmann als aktiven Account (aktuell: %s). Erst: gh auth switch --user dev-paul-fleischmann"}}' "$active"
